speaker: speaker1
text: Grand Theft Auto Three is awesome !

speaker: speaker2
text: It's more violent than TV news !

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , my God , three hours already ! I have to get the chores done !

speaker: speaker2
text: No time . That's their headlights in the window !

speaker: speaker1
text: OK , emergency measures . Let's throw the dishes in the trash ! Two birds with one stone ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Little dude , your life is over !

speaker: speaker1
text: No time to worry . We have to dispose of this evidence .
